title: V2 podman inspect
body:
* Demonstrates having a sub-command (inspect) bridge multiple packages 
* Expose podman container inspect
* Expose podman image inspect
* Duplicated ImageData to prevent import cycles.  Will be merged with other
  like structs after V2 migration is complete

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
